/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-variable -O3 -march=native -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.4.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/engine.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/data_storage/schema.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/data_storage/batch.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/data_storage/column.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/serialization/batch_serialization.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/engine.cpp.o -o engine  ../CsvMfReader/libreader.a ../CsvMfWriter/libwriter.a
